name: NORTHERN OIL & GAS, INC.
business: Northern Oil & Gas, Inc. is an independent energy company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of oil and natural gas properties in the United States, primarily in the Williston Basin, the Permian Basin, the Appalachian Basin and the Uinta Basin. The company operates as a non-operator, participating in wells operated by third parties. Its revenues are derived from the sale of oil, natural gas and natural gas liquids.
sellsTo: Oil and natural gas commodity markets

exposures.sentence: We are an independent energy company engaged as a non-operator in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of oil and natural gas properties in the United States, primarily in the Williston Basin, the Permian Basin, the Appalachian Basin and the Uinta Basin.
